microsoft_ft: **Scaled Azure's recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform for large-scale infrastructure testing, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability for distributed infrastructure, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a reusable model for continuous validation at scale.

Directed **14 cross-org infrastructure recovery executions** under executive visibility, coordinating engineering, operations, and partner teams — including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract.

Drove cross-functional alignment across infrastructure and platform engineering teams to define program milestones, resolve technical dependencies, and **deliver resilience initiatives on schedule** against aggressive timelines set by senior leadership.

Scaled team leverage through **AI-driven automation**, building an internal LLM-powered planning agent and restructuring program workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Established program health frameworks and **executive-facing reporting cadences** for infrastructure resilience initiatives, translating complex technical signals into actionable insights that informed resource allocation and roadmap prioritization decisions.
microsoft_2023: Championed **program adoption for AI-driven code generation** workflows across Azure infrastructure teams, conducting user demos and structured training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Influenced the infrastructure tooling roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ user research interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating findings into prioritized product requirements.

Optimized data integrity and retrieval for large-scale infrastructure documentation by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating content to an **AI-powered semantic search platform**, cutting engineer lookup time by 83% across key service teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, driving consensus across 140+ infrastructure and service teams toward a shared execution roadmap.

Mobilized a program strategy to eliminate operational toil during large-scale region launches, conducting structured discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual effort per region** and building a phased roadmap to automate critical infrastructure paths.

Engineered a **Power BI program health dashboard** tracking operational toil and automation coverage across 140+ teams, enabling senior leadership to identify high-impact gaps and direct engineering resources toward the highest-leverage infrastructure improvements.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping technical dependencies across 1,200+ robotic stations, and coordinating cross-functional engineering and operations teams through each phase.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning, backlog grooming, and retrospectives for a distributed infrastructure engineering team, **resolving 40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process to improve delivery velocity.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines** for robotics software deployment, reducing manual release overhead and accelerating the end-to-end deployment cycle by 25% across production environments.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end operations and managing the full scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, designing a structured CRM workflow that standardized execution and improved pipeline visibility for leadership.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the company website and Google Business profile to improve organic reach and lead quality across target markets.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ historical project records, identifying systemic margin leaks and delivering data-driven recommendations that were incorporated into revised estimating models.
